_doc: Claude Code preview registry. Logic is intentionally inlined here (not delegated to 06-tools/01-prototype-kit/launchers/*.command) because the macOS helper sandbox cannot read scripts in ~/Documents. End users who want to double-click should use the .command files in 06-tools/01-prototype-kit/launchers/ — those serve from the real source path directly. Both paths reach the same prototype but via different serving directories. See 06-tools/01-prototype-kit/launchers/notes/spec.md §6.
